patches.content:
Index: 
===================================================================
--- 
+++ 
@@ -26,10 +26,9 @@
         minSdkVersion 16
         targetSdkVersion rootProject.ext.targetSdkVersion
 
         externalNativeBuild {
-            // def stl = safePropGet("IJK_CXX_STL", "c++_static")
-            def stl = safePropGet("IJK_CXX_STL", "c++_shared")
+            def stl = safePropGet("IJK_CXX_STL", "c++_static")
             cmake {
                 arguments "-DANDROID_STL=${stl}", "-DANDROID_TOOLCHAIN=clang"
                 targets "ijkplayer"
             }

Index: 
===================================================================
--- 
+++ 
@@ -26,9 +26,9 @@
         minSdkVersion 16
         targetSdkVersion rootProject.ext.targetSdkVersion
 
         externalNativeBuild {
-            def stl = safePropGet("IJK_CXX_STL", "c++_static")
+            def stl = safePropGet("IJK_CXX_STL", "c++_static2")
             cmake {
                 arguments "-DANDROID_STL=${stl}", "-DANDROID_TOOLCHAIN=clang"
                 targets "ijkplayer"
             }
